cit.basis: Flat 27% Impuesto Sobre la Renta (ISR) on corporate profits (Código Tributario, Ley 11-92 as amended).

assets_tax_alternative_minimum.note: 1% Impuesto sobre Activos acts as an alternative minimum tax: pay the higher of 27% ISR or 1% of taxable assets. Not computed by this SME estimator.

cit.free_zone_note: Zonas francas (free zones, Ley 8-90) enjoy a 0% CIT regime; out of scope for this SME estimator.
cit.note: Administered by the Dirección General de Impuestos Internos (DGII).

vat.name: ITBIS
vat.note: ITBIS (Impuesto sobre Transferencias de Bienes Industrializados y Servicios) at 18% standard, 16% reduced for certain goods; exempt basket goods exist.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
The 1% assets-tax alternative minimum, free-zone (zona franca) regimes, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official DGII guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
